title: Topic Modeling
content:
# Topic Modeling (LDA)

## 1. Probabilistic Generation
For each document $d \in \mathcal{D}$:
1. Choose topic distribution $\theta_d \sim \text{Dirichlet}(\alpha)$
2. For each word $w_i$ in $d$:
   a. Choose a topic $z_i \sim \text{Multinomial}(\theta_d)$
   b. Choose word $w_i \sim \text{Multinomial}(\phi_{z_i})$ where $\phi_k \sim \text{Dirichlet}(\beta)$

## 2. Gibbs Sampling Equation
$$P(z_i = k \mid \mathbf{z}_{-i}) \propto \frac{n_{k,-i}^{(v)} + \beta}{\sum_v (n_{k,-i}^{(v)} + \beta)} \times \frac{n_{d,-i}^{(k)} + \alpha}{\sum_k' (n_{d,-i}^{(k')} + \alpha)}$$
